zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip於1491年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達時，他的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare36歲，母親Elizabeth St John20歲。他於大約1527年與Margaret Darcy在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1537年登記服兵役。他去世於1537年2月3日在英國瓦維其可爾本享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip于1491年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達时，他的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare36岁，母亲Elizabeth St John20岁。他于大约1527年与Margaret Darcy在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1537年登记服兵役。他去世于1537年2月3日在英国瓦維其可爾本享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip was born in 1491, in Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth St John, was 20. He married Margaret Darcy about 1527, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1537. He died on 3 February 1537, in Tyburn, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip est né en 1491, à Kildare, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth St John, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Darcy environ 1527, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1537. Il est décédé le 3 février 1537, à Tyburn, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip 1491 in Kildare, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth St John 20. Er hat um 1527 in Irland Margaret Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1537 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 3. Februar 1537 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Tyburn, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip è nato il nel 1491 nel Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth St John, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Darcy circa 1527, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1537. Morì il 3 febbraio 1537, nel Tyburn, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlipが1491年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダアで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildareは36歳，母Elizabeth St Johnは20歳であった。約1527年にアイルランドでMargaret Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1537年に兵役登録をした。彼は1537年2月3日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアトイブルンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip(이)가 1491년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth St John(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1527년 아일랜드에서 Margaret Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1537년 2월 3일 영국 워윅실르 타이번에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip nasceu em 1491, em Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth St John, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Darcy aproximadamente 1527, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1537. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1537, em Tyburn, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip родился в 1491 г. в местности каилдар, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth St John, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Darcy около 1527 г. в местности Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1537 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 3 февраля 1537 г. в местности тибурн, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James FitzGerald of Leixlip nació en 1491, en Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth St John, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Darcy aproximadamente 1527, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1537. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1537, en Tyburn, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
